name: prompt registry validator rejects an entry whose status value is not in active archived candidate enum
command:
mkdir -p prompts && printf 'prompts:
  - id: x
    versions:
      - version: 1.0.0
        status: made-up
' > prompts/registry.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/validate-registry.sh" --registry prompts/registry.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_status=made-up' err.txt && grep -q 'allowed=active|archived|candidate' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
